requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — COGUANOR NGO Standards (Harmonised with IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1), 120 V / 60 Hz Type A/B
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——COGUANOR NGO标准（与IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1协调），120V/60Hz A/B型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——COGUANOR NGO標準（與IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1協調），120V/60Hz A/B型插頭

summary.en: Guatemala applies COGUANOR NGO (Norma Guatemalteca Obligatoria) electrical safety standards for electronic and wireless devices, harmonised with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements, the successor to IEC 60950-1 and IEC 60065) and related IEC standards, adopted via COPANT regional processes. Electrical safety test reports demonstrating compliance with the applicable NGO standard must be included in the SIT homologación technical dossier. Guatemala operates on 120 V / 60 Hz with Type A and Type B (US-style, two- and three-pin ungrounded and grounded) plugs and sockets — the same system as the United States. Chinese-manufactured devices designed for 220 V / 50 Hz (standard mainland China) must be adapted or re-tested for 120 V / 60 Hz operation. Devices rated for dual-voltage (100–240 V, 50/60 Hz) universal input may not require electrical re-testing for voltage compatibility, but the applicable NGO standard compliance must still be confirmed and reported. Test reports from ILAC-accredited or internationally recognised laboratories are generally accepted in the SIT dossier.
summary.zh: 危地马拉依据COGUANOR NGO（危地马拉强制性标准）对电子及无线设备实施电气安全标准管控，该标准与IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备安全要求，IEC 60950-1及IEC 60065的继承标准）及相关IEC标准协调，通过COPANT区域程序采用。证明符合适用NGO标准的电气安全检测报告须纳入SIT型式认可技术文件。危地马拉使用120V/60Hz、A型和B型（美式，双脚不接地和三脚接地）插头和插座——与美国相同的系统。专为220V/50Hz（中国大陆标准）设计的中国制造设备须针对120V/60Hz运行进行适配或重新检测。额定双电压（100–240V，50/60Hz）通用输入的设备可能无需为电压兼容性重新进行电气检测，但仍须确认并报告适用NGO标准合规情况。通常接受ILAC认可或国际认可实验室出具的检测报告用于SIT文件。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉依據COGUANOR NGO（瓜地馬拉強制性標準）對電子及無線裝置實施電氣安全標準管控，該標準與IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通信技術裝置安全要求，IEC 60950-1及IEC 60065的繼承標準）及相關IEC標準協調，透過COPANT區域程序採用。證明符合適用NGO標準的電氣安全檢測報告須納入SIT型式認可技術文件。瓜地馬拉使用120V/60Hz、A型和B型（美式，雙腳不接地和三腳接地）插頭和插座——與美國相同的系統。專為220V/50Hz（中國大陸標準）設計的中國製造裝置須針對120V/60Hz運行進行適配或重新檢測。額定雙電壓（100–240V，50/60Hz）通用輸入的裝置可能無需為電壓相容性重新進行電氣檢測，但仍須確認並報告適用NGO標準合規情況。通常接受ILAC認可或國際認可實驗室出具的檢測報告用於SIT文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (as adopted by COGUANOR NGO via COPANT) — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment; primary electrical safety standard for wireless and IoT devices
IEC 60950-1 (legacy, as applicable for devices certified under the transitional period) — IT equipment safety standard superseded by IEC 62368-1
COGUANOR NGO — Norma Guatemalteca Obligatoria; mandatory electrical safety standards framework
COPANT — Pan American Standards Commission; regional body facilitating IEC/ISO adoption into NGO standards
Guatemalan electrical system: 120 V / 60 Hz, NEMA 1-15 (Type A) and NEMA 5-15 (Type B) plugs and sockets

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for wireless and electronic consumer devices is governed by GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 62368-1, replacing the earlier IEC 60950-1-based version) and tested as part of the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) process by CNAS-accredited laboratories. China operates on 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A, I, and hybrid sockets. Devices tested for CCC under GB 4943.1 may have overlapping electrical safety test data with COGUANOR NGO IEC 62368-1 requirements, but voltage compatibility (120 V / 60 Hz) must be separately confirmed for the Guatemalan market.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及消费电子设备的电气安全由GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1协调，取代早期基于IEC 60950-1的版本）管控，并由CNAS认可实验室作为CCC（中国强制认证）程序的一部分进行检测。中国使用220V/50Hz、A型、I型及混合型插座。依据GB 4943.1进行CCC认证检测的设备，其电气安全检测数据可能与COGUANOR NGO IEC 62368-1要求有重叠，但须另行为危地马拉市场确认电压兼容性（120V/60Hz）。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及消費電子裝置的電氣安全由GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1協調，取代早期基於IEC 60950-1的版本）管控，並由CNAS認可實驗室作為CCC（中國強制認證）程序的一部分進行檢測。中國使用220V/50Hz、A型、I型及混合型插座。依據GB 4943.1進行CCC認證檢測的裝置，其電氣安全檢測數據可能與COGUANOR NGO IEC 62368-1要求有重疊，但須另行為瓜地馬拉市場確認電壓相容性（120V/60Hz）。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Chinese electrical safety standard for IT and audio/video equipment, harmonised with IEC 62368-1
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory safety and EMC certification for consumer electronics in China under CNCA; includes electrical safety testing under GB 4943.1
CNAS (China National Accreditation Service) — accreditation body for Chinese safety test laboratories
Chinese electrical system: 220 V / 50 Hz, Type A / Type I / hybrid sockets

gap.en: The most significant electrical safety gap for Chinese-made devices entering Guatemala is the voltage and frequency difference: Guatemala uses 120 V / 60 Hz (Type A/B plugs), while mainland China uses 220 V / 50 Hz. Devices designed only for 220V/50Hz must be adapted, retested, and re-documented for 120V/60Hz operation before Guatemala market entry. Devices with universal input (100–240V, 50/60Hz) avoid this hardware gap but still require the applicable COGUANOR NGO electrical safety standard to be cited in the SIT dossier. Chinese GB 4943.1 (IEC 62368-1 harmonised) CCC test data may overlap with NGO electrical safety requirements, but the specific NGO citation must be confirmed and the test report must reference Guatemalan standards. Verify with a Guatemalan regulatory professional which current COGUANOR NGO electrical safety standard applies to the device category.
gap.zh: 中国制造设备进入危地马拉最主要的电气安全差距在于电压和频率差异：危地马拉使用120V/60Hz（A/B型插头），而中国大陆使用220V/50Hz。仅为220V/50Hz设计的设备须在进入危地马拉市场前针对120V/60Hz运行进行适配、重新检测和重新记录。具有通用输入（100–240V，50/60Hz）的设备可避免此硬件差距，但仍须在SIT文件中引用适用的COGUANOR NGO电气安全标准。中国GB 4943.1（IEC 62368-1协调版）CCC检测数据可能与NGO电气安全要求有重叠，但须确认具体NGO引用，且检测报告须引用危地马拉标准。请向危地马拉监管专业人士确认适用于该设备类别的现行COGUANOR NGO电气安全标准。
gap.zht: 中國製造裝置進入瓜地馬拉最主要的電氣安全差距在於電壓和頻率差異：瓜地馬拉使用120V/60Hz（A/B型插頭），而中國大陸使用220V/50Hz。僅為220V/50Hz設計的裝置須在進入瓜地馬拉市場前針對120V/60Hz運行進行適配、重新檢測和重新記錄。具有通用輸入（100–240V，50/60Hz）的裝置可避免此硬體差距，但仍須在SIT文件中引用適用的COGUANOR NGO電氣安全標準。中國GB 4943.1（IEC 62368-1協調版）CCC檢測數據可能與NGO電氣安全要求有重疊，但須確認具體NGO引用，且檢測報告須引用瓜地馬拉標準。請向瓜地馬拉監管專業人士確認適用於該裝置類別的現行COGUANOR NGO電氣安全標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — COGUANOR NGO electrical safety compliance required as part of SIT homologación technical dossier; product must be compatible with 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B (US-style) electrical system
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4943.1 electrical safety testing required as part of CCC certification in China; Chinese electrical system is 220 V / 50 Hz, Type A/I sockets

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] COGUANOR NGO electrical safety standards (harmonised with IEC 62368-1) are mandatory for wireless and electronic equipment sold in Guatemala and must be addressed in the SIT homologación dossier. The critical practical gap is Guatemala's 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B electrical system versus China's 220 V / 50 Hz system — devices must be voltage-compatible and the applicable NGO must be cited in the dossier. Verify the current applicable COGUANOR NGO electrical safety standards and voltage testing obligations with a qualified Guatemalan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] COGUANOR NGO电气安全标准（与IEC 62368-1协调）对在危地马拉销售的无线及电子设备为强制性要求，须在SIT型式认可文件中予以说明。关键实际差距在于危地马拉120V/60Hz/A/B型插头电气系统与中国220V/50Hz系统的差异——设备须具备电压兼容性，且须在文件中引用适用NGO。进入市场前请向合格的危地马拉监管专业人士核验适用的现行COGUANOR NGO电气安全标准及电压检测义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] COGUANOR NGO電氣安全標準（與IEC 62368-1協調）對在瓜地馬拉銷售的無線及電子裝置為強制性要求，須在SIT型式認可文件中予以說明。關鍵實際差距在於瓜地馬拉120V/60Hz/A/B型插頭電氣系統與中國220V/50Hz系統的差異——裝置須具備電壓相容性，且須在文件中引用適用NGO。進入市場前請向合格的瓜地馬拉監管專業人士核驗適用的現行COGUANOR NGO電氣安全標準及電壓檢測義務。
